# Architecture — agent-showcase

*Generated by the planner (story 9.5). The canonical path universe for all stories. Every `**Files to create/modify:**` path comes from §3.*

---

## 1. Stack

| Layer | Choice | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Framework | **Next.js 15** (App Router, `src/`, TypeScript) | React 19; RSC by default |
| UI | **Tailwind CSS** + **shadcn/ui** (Radix primitives) | utilities + shadcn only; no bespoke CSS files |
| Data | **Prisma ORM** + **PostgreSQL** (Neon serverless) | singleton via `src/lib/db.ts`, pinned `@prisma/client@^6` |
| Auth | **Auth.js (next-auth v5 beta)** + **@auth/prisma-adapter** | GitHub OAuth only; provisioned backbone — `src/auth.ts`, middleware, adapter models |
| Mutations/reads | **Server Actions** | no REST route handlers |
| Validation | **Zod** (`src/lib/validation.ts`) | validate before any DB write; trim before min |
| Tests | **Vitest** + **React Testing Library**, co-located `*.test.tsx` | scaffolded by `--with-vitest` |
| CI/CD | **GitHub Actions** (lint + build on PR) → Vercel | scaffolded by `--with-actions` |

## 2. Data model — `prisma/schema.prisma`

Auth.js adapter models (User, Account, Session, VerificationToken) are **pre-provisioned** — do NOT re-author them.

```prisma
// Extend the provisioned schema.prisma

model AgentProfile {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId      String   @unique
  user        User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  displayName String
  bio         String?  @db.Text
  framework   String   // e.g. "next.js", "langchain", "autogen"
  tags        String[] // searchable tags
  avatarUrl   String?
  githubUrl   String?
  websiteUrl  String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
  posts       Post[]

  @@index([framework])
}

model Post {
  id        String       @id @default(cuid())
  authorId  String
  author    AgentProfile @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  title     String
  slug      String       @unique
  body      String       @db.Text   // Markdown source
  published Boolean      @default(false)
  tags      String[]
  createdAt DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime     @updatedAt

  @@index([published, createdAt])
  @@index([tags])
}
```

## 3. File & folder inventory

**The canonical path universe. Every story's `**Files to create/modify:**` paths are drawn from this table — stories never invent paths.**

| Path | Kind | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `prisma/schema.prisma` | data | Auth adapter + AgentProfile + Post models |
| `src/lib/db.ts` | lib | Prisma client singleton (export: `prisma`) — provisioned, do not re-author |
| `src/auth.ts` | lib | Auth.js config — provisioned; exports `handlers`, `auth`, `signIn`, `signOut` |
| `src/middleware.ts` | infra | Auth.js route protection — provisioned; update matcher to protect `/profile/*` |
| `src/lib/validation.ts` | lib | Zod schemas: `agentProfileSchema`, `postSchema` |
| `src/lib/slug.ts` | lib | `generateSlug(title: string): string` via `slugify` |
| `src/app/layout.tsx` | route | Root layout — add nav bar with sign-in/out |
| `src/app/page.tsx` | route | Public home feed — recent published posts, `force-dynamic` |
| `src/app/auth/sign-in/page.tsx` | route | Sign-in page with GitHub button |
| `src/app/profile/page.tsx` | route | View own profile + posts; protected |
| `src/app/profile/edit/page.tsx` | route | Edit agent profile form; protected |
| `src/app/posts/new/page.tsx` | route | New post form; protected |
| `src/app/posts/[slug]/page.tsx` | route | Public post detail page |
| `src/app/browse/page.tsx` | route | Browse/search agents by framework/tag, `force-dynamic` |
| `src/app/actions/auth.ts` | server | `getSession()` helper — wraps `auth()` for use in server components/actions |
| `src/app/actions/profile.ts` | server | `createOrUpdateProfile(data)` server action |
| `src/app/actions/posts.ts` | server | `createPost(data)`, `publishPost(id)`, `listPublishedPosts(opts?)` |
| `src/app/actions/browse.ts` | server | `browseAgents(opts: {framework?, tags?, q?})` server action |
| `src/components/NavBar.tsx` (+ `.test.tsx`) | client | Sign-in/out button, user avatar |
| `src/components/AgentCard.tsx` (+ `.test.tsx`) | server | Profile card — displayName, bio, framework, tags |
| `src/components/ProfileForm.tsx` (+ `.test.tsx`) | client | Edit profile form → `createOrUpdateProfile` |
| `src/components/PostCard.tsx` (+ `.test.tsx`) | server | Post summary card — title, author, date |
| `src/components/PostEditor.tsx` (+ `.test.tsx`) | client | Markdown textarea → `createPost` |
| `src/components/FeedList.tsx` (+ `.test.tsx`) | server | Grid of `PostCard`s |
| `src/components/BrowseFilters.tsx` (+ `.test.tsx`) | client | Framework dropdown + tag chips + text search → `browseAgents` |
| `src/components/ui/*` | ui | shadcn primitives (button, card, input, textarea, badge, avatar) — add as needed |

## 4. Conventions (the coder's house rules — applied every story)

- **Auth singleton:** The auth backbone is provisioned. All stories use `import { auth, signIn, signOut } from '@/auth'`. The Prisma singleton exports `prisma` (not `db`) from `src/lib/db.ts`.
- **Data access:** reads/writes via **Server Actions** in `src/app/actions/*.ts`. No `app/api/*` route handlers (except the Auth.js `[...nextauth]/route.ts`, which is provisioned).
- **Session guard in mutations:** every write action calls `const session = await auth()` and returns early (or throws) when `!session?.user`.
- **Validation:** every action validates with Zod (`z.string().trim().min(1)` — trim BEFORE min). Import schemas from `src/lib/validation.ts`.
- **Prisma client:** one, via `prisma` from `src/lib/db.ts`. Use the exact model accessor names from `schema.prisma` (e.g. `prisma.agentProfile`, `prisma.post`).
- **force-dynamic on DB pages:** any page that reads the DB at render time MUST declare `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` to prevent build-time static prerendering with no `DATABASE_URL`.
- **Single export per file:** each actions file exports ONE action. Do not bundle multiple unrelated actions in one file; two stories must never both modify the same file.
- **Tests:** co-located `Foo.test.tsx` beside `Foo.tsx`; Vitest + RTL; action tests mock the DB (`vi.mock('@/lib/db')`), component tests render against prop fixtures.
- **Imports:** `@/*` alias for everything under `src/`.
- **Slugs:** use `slugify` lib (stories depend on `src/lib/slug.ts`); never hand-roll slug logic.

## 5. Data flow

```
NavBar (client) ─ signIn/signOut ──▶ src/auth.ts (GitHub OAuth)
ProfileForm (client) ─ createOrUpdateProfile() ──▶ prisma.agentProfile.upsert ──▶ AgentProfile row
PostEditor (client) ─ createPost() ──▶ prisma.post.create ──▶ Post row
page.tsx (RSC) ─ listPublishedPosts() ──▶ prisma.post.findMany ──▶ FeedList/PostCard
browse/page.tsx (RSC) ─ browseAgents() ──▶ prisma.agentProfile.findMany ──▶ AgentCard grid
```

## 6. Epic decomposition

| Epic | Stories | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| E1 Auth & Accounts | Schema, NavBar auth UI, sign-in page, session guard action | Auth backbone provisioned; stories wire usage |
| E2 Agent Profiles | Validation lib, profile action, ProfileForm, profile page | Depends on E1 schema |
| E3 Posts & Feed | Slug lib, post actions, PostEditor, FeedList, post detail page | Depends on E2 profile |
| E4 Browse & Discovery | Browse action, BrowseFilters, browse page | Depends on E3 posts |
